features.name: Pack Tactics
features.description: The shark has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the shark's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

features.name: Water Breathing
features.description: The shark can breathe only underwater.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) Piercing damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Pack Hunter - Aquatic predator with group tactics
tactical_info.positioning: Works with other sharks for advantage on attacks
tactical_info.damage_output: 7 piercing per hit with pack coordination
tactical_info.key_abilities: Pack Tactics for advantage, blindsight detection
tactical_info.synergies: Deadly in groups, excellent for aquatic encounters
